title: India's fossil fuel insecurity now a broader economic risk, not just import dependence issue: CEEW study
description: New Delhi [India], June 17 (ANI): India's energy security challenge has evolved beyond dependence on imported fossil fuels and now poses wider risks to inflation, industrial competitiveness, public finances and strategic autonomy, according to a new study released by the Council on Energy, Environment and Water (CEEW). title: Letter: Fossil fuel industry takes control of our government
description: We cannot expect meaningful climate action as long as our representatives are financially beholden to the very industry driving this crisis.
